name: CMP_MKT_VND_LOC_VL
query: SELECT B.SURVEY_LOCATION_ID, B.VENDOR_ID, B.SURVEY_LOCATION_CODE, B.STATUS, T.SURVEY_LOCATION_NAME, T.MISC_TEXT_1, T.MISC_TEXT_2, T.MISC_TEXT_3, T.DESCRIPTION, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_VND_LOC_B B, CMP_MKT_VND_LOC_TL T WHERE B.SURVEY_LOCATION_ID = T.SURVEY_LOCATION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
